Bacteria Culture Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a bacteria culture test? 
A bacteria culture test can determine if you have a bacterial infection Â and, if so, which type of bacteria is causing it. To do a bacterial culture test, you will need to give a sample of your blood, urine, skin, or other tissue. The type of sample depends on where the infection is located.
Bacteria are one-celled organisms. There
